hero.title: Not just a tannery. Nor just a factory. Both.
hero.intro: A vertically integrated manufacturer that selects the hide and finishes the stitch - no subcontracted middlemen, no inconsistent batches. Founded in a modest Kanpur workshop in 1977. The workshop grew. The obsession with the craft didn't.

story.heading: From a workshop to a vertically integrated facility.
paragraphs: We're not a trading house sourcing finished goods from wherever's cheapest that week. Nor are we a single-product tannery with no finishing capability of our own.

Tanning, cutting, stitching, and finishing all happen in-house, under one roof in Kanpur - the city that's home to the world's largest saddlery centre and some of South Asia's finest tanneries. Since 1977, we've grown from a single leather workshop into a vertically integrated, multi-product, multi-brand manufacturer.
story.quote: We didn't add sustainability to our process. We built our process to be sustainable.

items.title: Kings International Ltd.
items.body: Founded in Kanpur - the heart of India's leather industry - with a focus on hand-crafted leather goods.

items.title: Saddlery & Export Foundations
items.body: Building deep expertise in saddlery and harness manufacturing, and establishing early export relationships.

items.title: Vertical Integration
items.body: Bringing tanning in-house, giving full control over hide quality from raw material through to finished product.

items.title: Certifications & Sustainability
items.body: Aligning operations with ISO 9001, Leather Working Group, and Sustainable Leather requirements, using REACH-compliant chemicals throughout.

items.title: Brand Portfolio
items.body: Growing a multi-brand portfolio, including Ryder Belts, Target Hunting Accessories, Kingston, and Equitel.

items.title: Global Reach
items.body: Serving brands, wholesalers, distributors, retailers, and OEM partners across international markets from one integrated facility.

beliefs.heading: 11 things we won't compromise on.
items: Decades of expertise - founded 1977, still hands-on today.
Premium materials: buffalo and cow hides, selected, not settled for.
Traditional skill and modern technology, working in the same room.
Private label or full OEM - we flex to your specification, not ours.
Vertically integrated - tanning to finishing, under one roof.
Global export experience: compliance, documentation, on-time delivery.
Ethical business - fair labour, transparency, responsible sourcing.
Sustainability isn't a slogan: REACH-compliant chemicals, water recycling, renewable energy.
Every product is inspected before it leaves, not just before it's sold.
Customer-first - from development to after-sales, real people respond.
We build long-term partnerships, not one-off orders.

craftsmanship.heading: Our craftsmanship.
craftsmanship.intro: Master tanners, saddlers, cutters, and stitchers - many with decades on the same floor. We don't publish headshots; we publish the work.

images.alt: Hides drying at the in-house tannery

houses.heading: Everything we make, under five names.
houses.intro: Kingston, Equitel, Ryder, Target and Pets' Pal - each built for its own category, all cut, stitched and finished on the same Kanpur floor.

cta.eyebrow: See the factory behind the story
cta.heading: Walk the floor, section by section.
